小弟finance major 過3多少少 (2:1), 諗住19年讀finance 嘅master, 但唔知入唔入到uk比較勁嘅business school,好似 Warwick, London Business School, Cass Business School 等等
黎緊summer 會考GMAT 同CFA level 1，雖然唔知有冇用，但都想考下
真心好想入比較好嘅business school
唔知我呢個成績可唔可以報到呢啲business school? 如果唔得可以有咩alternatives?
除左成績你重有冇拎過咩獎啊

有2nd up咪報囉

不過讀完有冇用就你諗你啦

Do you have any working experience? They value that quite a lot. Try get 720+ gmat to compensate for your grade. And the entry competitiveness depends vastly on the course, say MSc Finance would usually be the hardest one to get in for b-school, u can go for A&F or management if you just want to get in
